title: Cap's random stuff
description: This mod is mostly preferences Erik (me, Captain) has for Minecraft, though most of it is configurable. It's also my first quilt mod!
body: # Cap's random stuff This mod is mostly preferences Erik (me, Captain) has for Minecraft, though most of it is configurable. It's also my first quilt mod! ## Current features: - Instantly enable respawn button - Instantly respawn (even if the gamerule is disabled! This also makes the above obsolete if enabled.) - Reconnect button on disconnected menu. - Automatically reconnect after 5s if you're still on disconnected menu. - And more to come! # By default, all patches are disabled, so the only difference you'll see is the splash text! However, they can be enabled (without restarting the game!) if you have mod menu installed.
